channel.title: Espionage and Intelligence Services - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Espionage and Intelligence Services - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Shifts in Power
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Shifts in Power

In the halls of the FBI, a shake,
Polygraphs make the leakers quake.
With Patel at the helm,
There’s a shift in the realm,
As Musk’s NASA dreams face a brake.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Unease at F.B.I. Intensifies as Patel Ousts Top Officials
  • Trump to Withdraw Musk’s Ally as Nominee for Top NASA Job

item.title: Cabinet Chaos and Scandalous Storms
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Cabinet Chaos and Scandalous Storms

There’s Gaetz with scandals to face,
Yet Trump still pushes his case.
Tulsi’s a pick,
Russia’s in the mix,
For a cabinet in a wild race.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Admits Gaetz May Not Be Confirmed. He’s Pushing His Nominees Anyway.
  • Lawyer Says His Client Testified That She Saw Gaetz Having Sex With Underage Girl
  • How Tulsi Gabbard Became a Favorite of Russia’s State Media
